answers: Aerospace engineering focuses on designing, building, and testing aircraft and spacecraft. It includes aeronautics (atmospheric flight) and astronautics (space flight).
Aerospace engineering holo aircraft, rocket, satellite, ar spacecraft design korar engineering branch. Eta engineering er moddhe onek exciting field.
Aerospace engineers work on everything from commercial airplanes to military jets, satellites, rockets, and space stations. They deal with aerodynamics, propulsion, and materials science.
Aerospace engineering is divided into aeronautical (planes, helicopters) and astronautical (rockets, spacecraft) engineering. Companies like NASA, SpaceX, and Boeing hire aerospace engineers.
